free_text: Double Differential Neutron Emission Cross Sections
Around 14 MeV Neutron Source  -- Volume II --
Intense 14 MeV neutron source OKTAVIAN of
Less than 2 nsec pulsed neutrons were generated.
Neutron flight path length was about 9.5 m.
NE-213 liquid scintillator 12.7 cm in diameter
and 5.08 cm in length. Source neutron flux was
monitored by the other NE-213 scintillator with 5.08 cm
diameter and 5.08 cm length, which was set at 90
degrees against the deuteron beam line.
